title: equisetum maximum var. serotinum
intro: Equisetum maximum var. serotinum, also known as giant horsetail, is a perennial plant that belongs to the class Equisetopsida, characterized by its long, hollow, and jointed stems. It has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum maximum var. serotinum include alleviating urinary issues, reducing swelling and pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat conditions such as kidney stones, cystitis, and urinary tract infections.
